General.DescriptionPlaceholder: Type a description of a npc

Errors.LlmApiKeyMissing: Configure the API key for the selected LLM provider in module settings.
Errors.LlmApiKeyMissingNamed: Configure "{setting}" in Configure Settings → Module Settings → AI Generated NPCs.
Errors.OpenRouterConfigMissing: Configure your OpenRouter API key in module settings.
Errors.OpenRouterImageFailed: OpenRouter image generation failed for model "{model}": {details}
Errors.ImagePromptPolicyViolation: The image prompt violates content policies for image generation. Edit the prompt and try again.
Errors.ImagePromptUnfixable: The image prompt could not be made compliant with content policies. Edit the prompt manually and try again.
Errors.UnsupportedSystem: AI Generated NPCs does not support the "{system}" system.
Errors.UnsupportedSystemHint: AI Generated NPCs supports WFRP4e and D&D5e. The active system is "{system}".
Errors.LlmJsonInvalid: The LLM returned invalid JSON: {details}. Try lowering temperature or reducing description complexity.
Errors.LlmJsonTruncated: The LLM response was cut off before the JSON finished (increase Max Tokens in module settings).

Notifications.LegacySettingsMigrated: AI Generated NPCs migrated {count} settings from the previous module version.
Notifications.CloudflareRemovedMigrated: Cloudflare image generation was removed. Image provider switched to OpenRouter — configure your OpenRouter API key in module settings.
Notifications.RemovedImageProviderMigrated: An unsupported image provider was removed. Image provider switched to OpenRouter — review module settings.
Notifications.ImageGenerationSkipped: Portrait generation was skipped. You can save the NPC without an image or use Generate Image to try again.
Notifications.ImagePromptSanitized: The image prompt was adjusted to comply with content policies.
Notifications.ImagePromptReviewSkipped: LLM is not configured — image prompt was not reviewed for content policy compliance.
Notifications.LlmJsonRetrying: NPC JSON was invalid or incomplete. Retrying with stricter instructions...

imageFolderLocation.Name: Image Folder Location
imageFolderLocation.Hint: Provide a location where the images will be saved, if folder doesn't exist it will be created

llmProvider.Name: LLM Provider
llmProvider.Hint: Choose which API generates NPC details and chat responses.

deepseekModel.Name: DeepSeek Model
deepseekModel.Hint: Model identifier, e.g. deepseek-chat or deepseek-reasoner

imageProvider.Name: Image Provider
imageProvider.Hint: Choose which API generates NPC portraits and /whisper img images.

openrouterSiteUrl.Name: OpenRouter HTTP-Referer (optional)
openrouterSiteUrl.Hint: Your Foundry site URL for OpenRouter rankings, e.g. https://foundry.example.com

openrouterAppName.Name: OpenRouter App Name (optional)
openrouterAppName.Hint: Application name sent to OpenRouter as X-Title.

historyLength.Name: Length of Chat GPT Conversation
historyLength.Hint: Number of messages being send during conversation with /whisper ai <prompt> command, high value will preserve longer context but will also increase the cost significantly

openAiApiKey.Name: OpenAI API Key
openAiApiKey.Hint: Provide an API key to run OpenAI

systemPrompt.Name: System Prompt
systemPrompt.Hint: Provide a context (System Prompt) for the AI to generate NPC

frequencyPenalty.Name: Frequency Penalty
frequencyPenalty.Hint: Provide a 'frequency_penalty' value for the AI to generate NPC, https://platform.openai.com/docs/api-reference/chat/create#chat-create-frequency_penalty

presencePenalty.Name: Presence Penalty
presencePenalty.Hint: Provide a 'presence_penalty' value for the AI to generate NPC, https://platform.openai.com/docs/api-reference/chat/create#chat-create-presence_penalty

maxTokens.Name: Max Tokens
maxTokens.Hint: Provide a 'max_tokens' value for the AI to generate NPC, https://platform.openai.com/docs/api-reference/chat/create#chat-create-max_tokens

temperature.Name: Temperature
temperature.Hint: Provide a 'temperature' value for the AI to generate NPC, https://platform.openai.com/docs/api-reference/chat/create#chat-create-temperature

topP.Name: Top P
topP.Hint: Provide a 'top_p' value for the AI to generate NPC, https://platform.openai.com/docs/api-reference/chat/create#chat-create-top_p

imageAdditionalQualities.Name: Additional Portrait Qualities
imageAdditionalQualities.Hint: Additional properties added to the image prompt, e.g. 'realistic, fantasy, detailed'

modelVersion.Name: OpenAI Chat Model
modelVersion.Hint: OpenAI model used when LLM Provider is set to OpenAI

OpenAI.DefaultSystemPrompt: You are a helpful and creative assistant to the Game Master in 4th Edition Warhammer Fantasy RPG. You help by providing descriptions and basic characteristics for NPCs, description of places, stories and adventures. Use the lore and history of Warhammer Fantasy World and be inspired by other fantasy literature or movies. Use an artistic style based on novels and stories. Do not use calculations and bullet points.
OpenAI.TechnicalSystemPrompt:
Return NPC text fields as plain text only (no HTML tags). Return one valid JSON object matching the schema at the end of this prompt. Do not skip fields. Do not wrap the response in markdown. Never put raw line breaks or double-quote characters inside JSON string values; use \n and avoid quotation marks in the prose. Keep each description sub-field concise: at most <<noOfSentences>> short sentences.
 1. appearance: face, body, clothes
 2. personality: character and attitude
 3. motivations: goals and drives
 4. biography: formative events
 5. specificTraits: distinctive features (<<noOfSentencesHalved>> sentences max)
OpenAI.JsonRepairPrompt: Your previous answer was invalid JSON. Reply with ONLY one valid JSON object matching the required schema. Use plain text in all description fields (no HTML). Do not use double-quote characters inside string values. Keep every description field brief.
OpenAI.JsonTruncatedHint: The previous response was too long and got cut off. Return a shorter valid JSON object with briefer description fields while keeping all required keys.
OpenAI.JsonRetryShortHint: Use at most 2 short sentences per description field. Prioritize valid JSON over detail.
OpenAI.StageImagePrompt: - Finally, based on all prepared content, prepare a safe-for-work English image prompt in the imagePrompt field. The prompt must comply with commercial image API content policies: no nudity, sexual content, graphic gore, hate symbols, real celebrity names, or copyrighted character names. Describe a fully clothed adult fantasy character. The description should start with '<<additionalImageQualities>>. A portrait of'. Return the generated description in JSON format.
OpenAI.ImagePromptReviewSystem: You are a content safety reviewer for AI image generation APIs (DALL-E, Flux, and similar). Ensure portrait prompts comply with provider content policies.
OpenAI.ImagePromptReviewUser:
Review this image generation prompt. If it violates content policies (sexual content, nudity, gore, graphic violence, hate, illegal activity, real celebrity names, minors in inappropriate contexts, or copyrighted characters referenced by name), rewrite it as a safe fantasy RPG character portrait that preserves the character's general appearance, age as an adult, clothing, and setting. If already compliant, return it with only minimal edits. Reply with ONLY the final English prompt text — no explanation.

Prompt:
<<prompt>>

WFRP.StageCharacteristicsPrompt:
1. Based on previous steps, return the NPC's characteristics in JSON format. Fill in the characteristics fields with numerical values on a scale from 1 to 100, where 0 is none, 100 is legendary. in 'name' field write NPC's name, if none provide, propose one.
 2. Based on previous steps, return the NPC's details in fields: species, gender, age, height, weight, hair, eyes. Put age as an integer (years). Put height as an integer in centimeters only (example: 175, not 1.75m). Put weight as an integer in kilograms only (example: 70, not 11 stone). Do not swap height and weight.
WFRP.StageCareersPrompt: 3. Based on the previous steps, select <<noOfCareers>> career(s). Use exact tier-1 English career rank names from this list only: <<careerList>>. Do not use social class names (Peasant, Burgher, Noble, Warrior, etc.) — pick a specific rank (e.g. Boatman, Soldier, Scion). Return names in a flat JSON array. Do not change spelling or case.
WFRP.StageTalentsPrompt: 4. Based on previous steps, select <<noOfTalents>> number of Talents from those available in the English version of WFRP 4ed handbook. Return the selected names in a flat JSON table format without any structures. Do not change the case. Do not change values. Don't change the names of talents.

DND5E.StageAbilityScoresPrompt: 1. Based on previous steps, return the NPC in JSON format. Fill abilityScores with base values from 8 to 16 (before racial adjustments): str, dex, con, int, wis, cha. Set name if not provided. 2. Return details: race, gender, age (integer years), size (tiny, sm, med, lg, huge, grg), alignment, speed (walk speed in feet, default 30).
DND5E.StageClassPrompt: 3. This NPC is a character with class levels. Set character.class to one exact name from this SRD list only: <<classList>>. Set character.level to <<classLevel>>.
DND5E.StageCreaturePrompt: 3. This NPC is a creature stat block. Set creature.type (e.g. humanoid, beast), creature.challengeRating (e.g. 1/4, 1, 5), creature.armorClass (integer), and creature.hitPoints (integer).
DND5E.StageFeatsAndSkillsPrompt: 4. Select <<noOfFeats>> feat(s) from this SRD list only: <<featList>>. Select <<noOfSkills>> proficient skill(s) from this SRD list only: <<skillList>>. Return flat JSON arrays feats and skills with exact English names.
